title: Food Prep: Knife Skills
summary: Overhead chef's hands rapidly dicing fresh herbs and tomatoes on a wooden board.
prompt: An overhead close-up of a chef's hands chopping fresh basil, parsley, and ripe tomatoes on a dark wooden cutting board. The knife flashes rhythmically, perfectly diced cubes accumulating in a vivid pile. Warm directional lighting from the upper right, juice glistening on the blade. Food-magazine cinematic style, shallow depth of field, satisfying culinary rhythm.
